## Ultimate FPS Boost Modpack
### 
The Ultimate FPS Boost modpack is perfect for players looking to optimize Minecraft's performance on a wide range of systems, from low-end laptops to high-end PCs. This pack includes a curated selection of the most effective optimization mods, ensuring you can achieve significantly higher frame rates (FPS) without compromising the vanilla Minecraft experience.

By focusing solely on performance enhancements, this modpack avoids changing the core gameplay, visuals, or features of the game. Users can expect smoother gameplay, reduced lag, and overall better performance, making it ideal for those who want to enjoy Minecraft on systems with lower specs or those looking to push their high-performance systems to the limit.


Key features:

- Includes lightweight, FPS-boosting mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore.
- Minimal setup required—just install and enjoy the performance boost.
- Compatible with the latest Minecraft versions and updated frequently to ensure optimal performance with the newest game features.
- Does not include any visual or quality-of-life mods, allowing you to add your own preferred mods without conflict.

Whether you’re playing on a modest laptop or a powerful desktop, the Ultimate FPS Boost modpack will enhance your gameplay experience by maximizing your FPS. Perfect for players who want a seamless vanilla experience but with significantly improved performance!

## Mods:
